mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan_id, medicine_id, dosage, task_date, time_point, status, operate_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM medication_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND task_date = #{taskDate} ORDER BY time_point ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO medication_task (user_id, plan_id, medicine_id, dosage, task_date, time_point, status) VALUES
(#{task.userId}, #{task.planId}, #{task.medicineId}, #{task.dosage}, #{task.taskDate}, #{task.timePoint, typeHandler=com.whu.medicalbackend.handler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{task.status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM medication_task WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND task_date >= #{fromDate}
mapper.update:
UPDATE medication_task SET status = 2 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM medication_task WHERE status = 0 AND task_date = #{taskDate} ORDER BY time_point ASC
